response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 16+ years of experience and proven ability to ship at scale (millions of requests/second at Sociomantic, millions of mail sends at Optilyz). Recent AI/agent infrastructure work aligns with modern tooling requirements. However, resume lacks specific experimentation platform, telemetry infrastructure, feature flagging, and statistical analysis experience that are core competencies for a Principal-level growth/experimentation systems role. Technical fundamentals are excellent but domain expertise gap is significant for this specialized position.
strengths: 16+ years spanning full-stack engineering with demonstrated scale expertise handling millions of concurrent requests and mail sends
Staff-level positions and extensive teaching activities (workshops, courses) show strong technical leadership and mentorship ability
Polyglot programmer proficient in required languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, C#, Java) with hands-on production experience
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation frameworks, feature flagging systems, or rollout-risk management infrastructure
Lacks specific background in metrics/telemetry foundations, statistical analysis, and A/B testing methodologies central to growth systems
Recent work (3+ years at Optilyz) focused on direct mail optimization, not SaaS growth platforms or multi-team experimentation architecture

key_factors.factor: Missing experimentation platform and metrics domain expertise
Strong general technical fundamentals and scale experience
Recent AI/agent infrastructure alignment with modern tooling
